spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (window., translate() with runtime script (~4573 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 5 buttons, 2 inputs, 0 selects, 2 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (adjust, chart, cutoff, distribution, exactly, logits, long, probability, sampling, sliders, survive, tail, temperature, ).

edge_cases.rationale: No visible edge case / fallback / error handling — only the happy path.

references.rationale: Page does not include the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link — violates the rule #3 self-heal invariant.

design_system.rationale: 7 raw hex colour(s) still in the style block. The design system requires CSS variables (`--bg-ivory`, `--text-charcoal` etc.)

openQuestions.title: Add explicit edge case coverage
openQuestions.detail: Pick one failure mode the spec or chromestatus motivation calls out (unsupported browser, denied permission, empty input, etc.) and surface it as a distinct demo state alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link
openQuestions.detail: Page is missing the chromestatus.com/feature/6325545693478912 link inside a `references` section. CLAUDE.md rule #3 requires this on every concept so the slug-recovery script can re-derive the canonical name.

openQuestions.title: Swap raw hex colours for CSS variables
openQuestions.detail: Find the remaining hex literals in the inline `<style>` and replace each with the matching variable from `public/styles.css`. Re-check WCAG AA on any new pair you create.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("Adds sampling parameters to the Prompt API. These control how tokens are sampled from the model, giving developers control over the "creativeness" or "randomness" of the output. Additionally, it adds attributes to the LanguageModel instance") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://webmachinelearning.github.io/prompt-api to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~4573 chars of script across 5 button(s) and 4 other control(s). hits 3 pass / 1 partial / 2 fail across the six rubric criteria.
